ecarx.carext.connect.bt

Interface IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback

  • Enclosing interface:
    IBtExtension

    public static interface IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback
    The interface definition of the callback to be called when receiving Bluetooth device messages.
    Since:
    2

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onBtBondedStatusChanged(BtDeviceInfo device, int status, int reason)
      When function IBtExtension.requestBondedDevices() function is called, if the ACL state changes, this callback function will be called
      void onBtNameChanged(java.lang.String btName)
      When function IBtExtension.setBtName(String) } is called, this callback function returns the result
      void onBtOperateCallback(int operate, int volume)
      When the Bluetooth device issues a command, this callback function will be called
      void onBtStateChanged(int btState)
      When function IBtExtension.setBtEnable(boolean) is called, this callback function returns the result
      void onErrorDetect(int status)
      Bluetooth error detection for connection
      void onFoundNearBtDeviceInfo(BtDeviceInfo nearBtInfo)
      When function IBtExtension.startDiscovery() is called, if a new Bluetooth device is found, this callback function will be called
      void onHeadsetPowerChanged(BtDeviceInfo device, int power)
      When the battery level of the Bluetooth earphone changes, this callback function will be called
      void onLocalBtInfoCallback(LocalBluetooth localBtInfo)
      When a local Bluetooth device is found, this function will be called back
      void onMediaStatusUpdate(int operate, int status)
      When function IBtExtension.notifyMediaCurrentStatus(int, int) is called, this callback function returns the result
      void onPairedDevices(java.util.List<BtDeviceInfo> btInfoList)
      When function IBtExtension.requestBondedDevices() is called, if there are Bluetooth devices that have already been paired, this callback function will be called
      void onProfileConnection(java.lang.String macAddress, int status)
      When function IBtExtension.requestBoundedDeviceOperation(int, String) is called or the Bluetooth transmission protocol changes, this callback function will be called
      void onScanOver(int scanValue)
      When function IBtExtension.startDiscovery() or IBtExtension.cancelDiscovery() is called, this callback function will be called

    • Method Detail

      • onBtStateChanged

        void onBtStateChanged(@IBtConstant.BtStatus
                      int btState)
        When function IBtExtension.setBtEnable(boolean) is called, this callback function returns the result
        Parameters:
        btState - IBtConstant.BtStatus
        Since:
        2

      • onScanOver

        void onScanOver(@IBtConstant.ScanBtStatus
                int scanValue)
        When function IBtExtension.startDiscovery() or IBtExtension.cancelDiscovery() is called, this callback function will be called
        Parameters:
        scanValue - IBtConstant.BtStatus
        Since:
        2

      • onFoundNearBtDeviceInfo

        void onFoundNearBtDeviceInfo(@NonNull
                             BtDeviceInfo nearBtInfo)
        When function IBtExtension.startDiscovery() is called, if a new Bluetooth device is found, this callback function will be called
        Parameters:
        nearBtInfo - Bluetooth device object
        Since:
        2

      • onLocalBtInfoCallback

        void onLocalBtInfoCallback(@NonNull
                           LocalBluetooth localBtInfo)
        When a local Bluetooth device is found, this function will be called back
        Parameters:
        localBtInfo - local Bluetooth device object
        Since:
        2

      • onBtNameChanged

        void onBtNameChanged(@NonNull
                     java.lang.String btName)
        When function IBtExtension.setBtName(String) } is called, this callback function returns the result
        Parameters:
        btName - Bluetooth name
        Since:
        2

      • onPairedDevices

        void onPairedDevices(@NonNull
                     java.util.List<BtDeviceInfo> btInfoList)
        When function IBtExtension.requestBondedDevices() is called, if there are Bluetooth devices that have already been paired, this callback function will be called
        Parameters:
        btInfoList - Bluetooth devices list
        Since:
        2

      • onBtBondedStatusChanged

        void onBtBondedStatusChanged(@NonNull
                             BtDeviceInfo device,
                             @IBtConstant.ACLStatus
                             int status,
                             @IBtConstant.ACLFailReason
                             int reason)
        When function IBtExtension.requestBondedDevices() function is called, if the ACL state changes, this callback function will be called
        Parameters:
        device - Bluetooth devices object
        status - ACL status IBtConstant.ACLStatus
        reason - ACL fail reason IBtConstant.ACLFailReason
        Since:
        2

      • onProfileConnection

        void onProfileConnection(@NonNull
                         java.lang.String macAddress,
                         @IBtConstant.BtConnectionStatus
                         int status)
        When function IBtExtension.requestBoundedDeviceOperation(int, String) is called or the Bluetooth transmission protocol changes, this callback function will be called
        Parameters:
        macAddress - MAC Address
        status - connection status IBtConstant.BtConnectionStatus
        Since:
        2

      • onHeadsetPowerChanged

        void onHeadsetPowerChanged(@NonNull
                           BtDeviceInfo device,
                           int power)
        When the battery level of the Bluetooth earphone changes, this callback function will be called
        Parameters:
        device - Bluetooth device object
        power - Earphone battery level range 1~9
        Since:
        2

      • onMediaStatusUpdate

        void onMediaStatusUpdate(@IBtConstant.NoticeMediaType
                         int operate,
                         @IBtConstant.NoticeMediaStatus
                         int status)
        When function IBtExtension.notifyMediaCurrentStatus(int, int) is called, this callback function returns the result
        Parameters:
        operate - Media notification typeIBtConstant.NoticeMediaType
        status - Media notification status IBtConstant.NoticeMediaStatus
        Since:
        2

      • onErrorDetect

        void onErrorDetect(int status)
        Bluetooth error detection for connection
        Parameters:
        status - Connection Bluetooth device status IBtConstant.BtDeviceStatus
        Since:
        2

      • onBtOperateCallback

        void onBtOperateCallback(int operate,
                         int volume)
        When the Bluetooth device issues a command, this callback function will be called
        Parameters:
        operate - Bluetooth operation media action type IBtConstant.BtOptMediaType
        volume - Volume range from 1~39
        Since:
        2
